home.title1: Find viral videos in any channel —
home.subtitle: Stop guessing. See what works in your niche and replicate it instantly.

home.emailSubtitle: Real outlier analyses, patterns, and ideas — free, every Friday.
home.faqTitle: How to find viral YouTube video ideas
home.faq1q: What is a YouTube outlier video?
home.faq1a: An outlier video is one that performs significantly above the channel's average — typically 3x or more views. These videos reveal what content resonates most with an audience and what patterns can be replicated.
home.faq2q: How does Outly find viral YouTube video ideas?
home.faq2a: Outly fetches the last 50 videos from any channel, calculates the average views, and flags videos that exceed 3x the average. It then uses AI to analyze why each outlier performed so well and generates a step-by-step replication guide.
home.faq3q: Can I use Outly for YouTube SEO?
home.faq3a: Yes. By identifying what content goes viral in your niche, you can reverse-engineer successful titles, hooks, and topics — which is the most effective form of YouTube SEO.
home.faq4q: What's the difference between free and Pro?
home.faq4a: Free users get 3 searches per day and see the first AI breakdown. Pro users ($15/mo) get unlimited searches, full AI analysis on all outliers, and shareable analysis links.
